positive: A stylized, high-contrast cosmic mural featuring bioluminescent neon flora intertwining with celestial bodies. The composition is centered and symmetrical, showcasing abstract elements of nebula gas and deep space merging with delicate botanical silhouettes. Utilize deep indigo, electric cyan, magenta, and vibrant gold accents. The overall style is detailed vector illustration meets ethereal stained glass, perfect for a repeat or central apparel print. Focus on sharp edges, clean silhouettes, and radial symmetry, radiating outward from a central point of glowing energy.
